Notes & Professional Observations

Data Definitions вАФ Billing ¬Ј Contract ¬Ј Revenue (GL)

  • Revenue вАФ GL (General Ledger): account balances by project √Ч year 2018вАУ2025 вАФ includes non-billing items such as HO, internal units (DS, ME, HR, ST), adjustments Z_xxxxx and negatives (reversals) ¬Ј total 4,258,603,041.01 THB
  • Billing вАФ Invoice (Issue Invoice actual / AR): the ¬Ђamount before VAT¬ї from the invoice-issuance report by project √Ч year 2015вАУ2026 (incl. 1 undated invoice of GLI22010) ¬Ј total 3,769,538,864.93 THB
  • Contract Value (Contract Amount): contract/PO value by project from the Contract Amt. column in report AR 4.3.1 (82 projects) ¬Ј total 5,023,917,577.36 THB вАФ compared with Billing it shows billing progress (Billing √Ј Contract)
  • Variance = Revenue (GL) вИТ Billing = +489,064,176.08 THB ¬Ј by-project status: matched to the baht 28 ¬Ј variance 43 ¬Ј GL only 26 ¬Ј Invoice only 11

Considerations

  • Different lenses: the variance reflects the gap between ¬Ђaccounting revenue recognition (GL)¬ї and ¬Ђinvoice issuance (AR)¬ї, plus scope/timing differences вАФ review the definitions before drawing conclusions
  • Some codes donвАЩt map 1:1: the GL holds GLI25003 / 25008 / 25009 combined, while Invoice splits them #1 / #2 вАФ this group is not a 1:1 match
  • File Book5: attachment not yet received вАФ once sent (Excel/CSV preferred) it will be reconciled against the GL for an extra layer of verification
  • Current GL source: built from the numeric table provided by the user, reconciling to 4,258,603,041.01 вАФ matching the userвАЩs computed total to the baht

E-Filing & DBD Login Credentials ¬Ј 10 Companies

Stores E-Filing credentials (Revenue Department ¬Ј efiling.rd.go.th) and DBD credentials (Department of Business Development ¬Ј DBD e-Filing) per company ¬Ј Edits save automatically and sync to the cloud like other data ¬Ј Passwords are hidden вАФ click рЯСБ to reveal or вІЙ to copy
рЯФТ These credentials are stored in your browser and synced through your own Firebase вАФ never share the dashboard URL with outsiders, and keep your Firebase Security Rules locked down.

DOC вАФ Company Document Vault

Each column = a company ¬Ј each row = a document category (Financial Statements ¬Ј Bank Confirmation ¬Ј Other) ¬Ј drag & drop files into any cell to embed them вАФ supports PDF, images, Excel, Word, etc. ¬Ј files sync across all devices automatically ¬Ј click a file to view or download
